title: Der schwarze Husar
writer: Curt J. Braun, Leo Lenz, Philipp Lothar Mayring
actors: Conrad Veidt, Mady Christians, Wolf Albach-Retty
plot: In 1812, during the French period, large parts of Germany are occupied by the troops of Napoleon. Several paramilitary Freikorps units battle the French forces, among them the Black Brunswickers led by the 'Black Duke' Frederick W...
